creator: mail_me@riseup.net
text:
During one of those sleepless nights I decided to update Mate 1.12 to 1.14. Two packages, namely MATE System Monitor and Mozo are now GTK3 only as upstream dropped GTK2 support for them. The rest of the packages remain unchanged in that regard.

Enjoy!

**** UPDATED PACKAGES ****
mate-themes-3.18.1 -> mate-themes-3.18.3
atril-1.12.2 -> atril-1.14.2
atril-lite-1.12.2 -> atril-lite-1.14.2
caja-extensions-1.12.0 -> caja-extensions-1.14.1
caja-1.12.4 -> caja-1.14.2
engrampa-1.12.0 -> engrampa-1.14.1
eom-1.12.2 -> eom-1.14.2
libmatekbd-1.12.1 -> libmatekbd-1.14.1
libmatemixer-1.12.1 -> libmatemixer-1.14.0
libmateweather-1.12.1 -> libmateweather-1.14.2
marco-1.12.1 -> marco-1.14.2
mate-applets-1.12.1_1 -> mate-applets-1.14.1
mate-backgrounds-1.12.0 -> mate-backgrounds-1.14.0
mate-common-1.12.0 -> mate-common-1.14.0
mate-control-center-1.12.1 -> mate-control-center-1.14.1
mate-desktop-1.12.1 -> mate-desktop-1.14.1
mate-icon-theme-1.12.0 -> mate-icon-theme-1.14.0
mate-icon-theme-faenza-1.12.0 -> mate-icon-theme-faenza-1.14.0
mate-media-1.12.1 -> mate-media-1.14.1
mate-menus-1.12.0 -> mate-menus-1.14.0
mate-notification-daemon-1.12.1 -> mate-notification-daemon-1.14.1
mate-panel-1.12.2 -> mate-panel-1.14.2
mate-polkit-1.12.0 -> mate-polkit-1.14.0
mate-power-manager-1.12.1 -> mate-power-manager-1.14.0
mate-screensaver-1.12.0_1 -> mate-screensaver-1.14.1
mate-session-manager-1.12.1 -> mate-session-manager-1.14.1
mate-settings-daemon-1.12.1 -> mate-settings-daemon-1.14.1
mate-system-monitor-1.12.1 -> mate-system-monitor-1.14.1
mate-terminal-1.12.1 -> mate-terminal-1.14.1
mate-utils-1.12.0 -> mate-utils-1.14.1
mozo-1.12.0 -> 	mozo-1.14.1
pluma-1.12.2 -> pluma-1.14.1
meta: mate 1.12.0 -> 1.14.0  
meta: mate-base 1.12.0 -> 1.14.0

The headline changes in MATE 1.14 are:

    Improved GTK+3 support across the entire MATE Desktop.
    Full GTK 3.20 support in all MATE themes.
    Client Side Decorated applications render correctly in all themes.
    Completely ported MATE System Monitor and Mozo to GTK+3 only.
    Touchpad configuration now supports edge and two-finger scrolling independently.
    Python extensions in Caja can now be managed separately.
    All three window focus modes are selectable.
    MATE Panel now has the ability to change icon sizes for menubar and menu items.
    MATE NetSpeed Applet has been merged into the MATE Applets package.
    MATE Terminal support VTE 2.91 API when built for GTK+3.
    Volume and Brightness OSD can now be enabled/disabled.
    Translations are updated. Thank you to our team of translators!
